type.description: Delegator type ('contract' for KT.. address or 'user' for tz.. address)

alias.description: Name of the project behind the account or account description

address.description: Public key hash of the account

delegationLevel.description: Block height of last delegation operation

delegationTime.description: Block datetime of last delegation operation (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`)
